description_long: This is a compact, retro-styled van with a two-tone color scheme featuring a white upper section and a red lower body. The roof and hood are decorated with scattered autumn leaves in orange, yellow, and brown, giving it a playful and seasonal appearance. The front of the van has a distinctive V-shaped design with round headlights and a silver bumper, as well as a license plate reading 'TOD'. The side windows are rectangular and black, with three on each side, and the wheels are small and black with silver hubcaps. The headlights are illuminated, casting a wide beam of light forward. The overall design suggests a classic camper or minivan, likely inspired by vintage models from the mid-20th century.
description: A small, retro van with a white and red body, autumn leaf decorations, and illuminated headlights. It features multiple windows and a playful, vintage design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped front, round headlights, silver bumper, and 'TOD' license plate, with headlights casting light forward.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying three rectangular windows, a red lower body, and autumn leaf decorations on the roof, with headlights beaming to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a large rear window, the 'TOD' license plate, and the decorated roof, with no headlights visible.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with three windows, red lower body, and autumn leaf roof decorations, headlights beaming to the right.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
